source_note: CPUC Decision D.06-01-007 — the Energy Resource Recovery Account (ERRA) reasonableness/prudence review for Southern California Edison Company; the Commission rejected the Division of Ratepayer Advocates' recommended $16.36M disallowance for hour-ahead-market transactions, finding SCE's least-cost-dispatch process reasonable. ERRA is California's annual fuel & purchased-power prudence determination. Adopted January 2006 (the CPUC decision number D.YY-MM-NNN encodes the adoption year+month); `issued_date` is left null because the exact adoption day is not carried in the CPUC HTML decision and is not inferred. Listed for reference (metadata-only; published as HTML on the CPUC document portal). Source: CPUC (docs.cpuc.ca.gov/published/Final_decision/52767-03.htm).
